## Release Checklist

Complete this section only for release preparation PRs.

- [ ] `SKYGATE_APP_VERSION` updated in `CMakeLists.txt`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` entries moved to the release version
- [ ] Fresh empty `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` section left for the next cycle
- [ ] Manual `Package` workflow run completed
- [ ] AppImage artifact checked
- [ ] DMG artifact checked
- [ ] Windows MSI/ZIP artifacts checked
- [ ] Tag will match `SKYGATE_APP_VERSION` as `vX.Y.Z`
